dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Carol. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Carol! How can I help you today?
I work as a product manager. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A product manager — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
I mostly work with management, testing, programming. Currently working on project_C.
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy gaming, streaming. I also like reading about cybersecurity.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
I prefer a flexible approach to work. My go-to tools are IntelliJ and Gradle.
Noted! I'll keep your flexible preference in mind.
